message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "tuple" as T
participant "Upper layer" as U
participant "IPv4 layer" as I4L
participant "Routing table" as RT
participant "IPv4 interface" as I4I
participant "ARP" as AR
participant "Lower layer" as L

T -- U : IPdata
U --> I4L : Allocate IPv4 header
I4L --> RT : dst=192.0.2.1
I4L --> T : IPv4.oif=ifp1
I4L --> T : IPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
I4I --> L : gw=198.51.100.1
I4I --> AR : ARP request
I4I --> L : ARP response
I4I --> AR : resolved packets
I4I --> L : send as send thread
L --> I4I : send packet

@enduml
